summary: Iter_44 — retest of the SOR Report tab after main agent's fix to SORReportExport.jsx (prop `selected`→`value` + options mapped to `[{value,label}]`). Verdict: FIX VERIFIED. The SOR Report tab now renders without crashes. Table mounts with 1,706 total styles (50 DOM rows visible due to pageSize=50), all three MultiSelect filters open with correctly labeled options, search filter trims rows, and the Export CSV button is visible and enabled.

verifications.sor_tab_renders: PASS. [data-testid='exports-tab-sor'] clickable, no React error overlay, no console pageerror.
verifications.sor_report_table: PASS. [data-testid='sor-report-table'] mounts. Header says '1,706 of 1,706 styles after filters'; 50 rows visible in DOM (matches pageSize=50). Well above the '>=100 rows in dataset' acceptance bar.
verifications.sor_filters_render: PASS. sor-cat-filter, sor-subcat-filter, sor-brand-filter all present. Dropdowns open on click. Category dropdown shows 10 options (first='Accessories', label populated — no undefined labels), subcategory shows 35 options, brand shows 4 options. Confirms the `{value,label}` shape fix worked.
verifications.sor_search_filters_rows: PASS. Typing 'zz_nonexistent_xxx' into [data-testid='sor-report-search'] collapses table from 50→0 DOM rows; clearing restores them.
verifications.sor_export_btn: PASS. [data-testid='sor-report-export-btn'] visible, not disabled (disabled attribute null because filtered.length > 0).
verifications.console_errors: CLEAN. 0 pageerrors. 1 console error but it's an unrelated '401 Failed to load resource' (not MultiSelect / not SORReportExport).

critical_code_review_comments: Carry-over from iter_43 — MultiSelect.jsx still has no default for `value` (no `value = []`) nor runtime guard. A future caller passing the wrong prop will white-screen the tab the same way. Consider adding `value = []` default + PropTypes.
Carry-over — SORReportExport.exportCsv writes r.units_6m into both 'Units Sold' (col 6) and 'Units Last 6 Months' (col 7); product owner should confirm duplication is intentional.
context_for_next_testing_agent: SOR Report tab fully working. MultiSelect prop API issue closed. No further retest required for this bug. If any MultiSelect regression appears elsewhere, check every call site uses prop `value=` + options in `[{value,label}]` shape.
rca_of_the_issue: RCA confirmed and closed: SORReportExport.jsx was using the legacy MultiSelect API (`selected` + plain string options). MultiSelect.jsx expects `value` (string[]) + `options` as `[{value,label,group?}]`, and crashes at render when `value` is undefined (`value.length` TypeError). Main agent's fix — (1) rename `selected`→`value` on the three MultiSelect invocations; (2) map category/subcategory/brand sets through `.map(v => ({value: v, label: v}))` — resolves both the crash and the would-be undefined labels. Verified live.
